scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/client/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/testing/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/benchmark/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/adapter-kit/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/adapter-openclaw/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/adapter-opencode/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.build: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/adapter-kit/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/testing/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/benchmark/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/client/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/adapter-openclaw/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/adapter-opencode/tsconfig.json
